name: github-pr-redis-cache
title: Add Redis caching layer to billing-api
body:
This PR introduces a Redis-backed read-through cache in front of the invoice lookups in billing-api. We add a new dependency on a shared Redis cluster (redis) and a cache-warming job.

IMPORTANT: this change adds a new `invoice_cache` table used for cache bookkeeping, so the database migration in `migrations/0042_invoice_cache.sql` MUST be applied before this is deployed, or the service will fail to boot. Cache reads fall back to Postgres on a miss.

Rollout: deploy behind the `billing_cache_enabled` feature flag, off by default.
